en: After these things the word of the LORD came to Abram in a vision: "Fear not, Abram, I am your shield; your reward shall be very great."
zh: 這些事以後，耶和華的話在異象中臨到亞伯蘭說： “亞伯蘭，你不要懼怕， 我是你的盾牌； 你的賞賜是很大的。”

en: But Abram said, "O Lord GOD, what will you give me, for I continue childless, and the heir of my house is Eliezer of Damascus?"
zh: 亞伯蘭說：“主耶和華啊，我一向都沒有孩子，你還能賜給我甚麼呢？這樣，承受我家業的，就是大馬士革人以利以謝了。”

en: And Abram said, "Behold, you have given me no offspring, and a member of my household will be my heir."
zh: 亞伯蘭又說：“你既然沒有給我後裔，那生在我家中的人，就是我的繼承人了。”

en: And behold, the word of the LORD came to him: "This man shall not be your heir; your very own son shall be your heir."
zh: 耶和華的話又臨到亞伯蘭說：“這人必不會作你的繼承人；你親生的才會是你的繼承人。”

en: And he brought him outside and said, "Look toward heaven, and number the stars, if you are able to number them." Then he said to him, "So shall your offspring be."
zh: 於是領他到外面去，說：“你向天觀看，數點眾星，看你能不能把它們數得清楚。”又對他說：“你的後裔將要這樣眾多。”

en: And he believed the LORD, and he counted it to him as righteousness.
zh: 亞伯蘭信耶和華，耶和華就以此算為他的義了。

en: And he said to him, "I am the LORD who brought you out from Ur of the Chaldeans to give you this land to possess."
zh: 耶和華又對亞伯蘭說：“我是耶和華，曾經把你從迦勒底的吾珥領出來，為要把這地賜給你作產業。”

en: But he said, "O Lord GOD, how am I to know that I shall possess it?"
zh: 亞伯蘭說：“主耶和華啊，我憑甚麼能知道我必得這地為業呢？”

en: He said to him, "Bring me a heifer three years old, a female goat three years old, a ram three years old, a turtledove, and a young pigeon."
zh: 耶和華對他說：“你給我拿一頭三歲的母牛犢，一隻三歲的母山羊，一隻三歲的公綿羊，一隻斑鳩和一隻雛鴿。”

en: And he brought him all these, cut them in half, and laid each half over against the other. But he did not cut the birds in half.
zh: 亞伯蘭就把這一切拿了來，每樣都從當中劈開，一半一半相對擺列；只是鳥卻沒有劈開。

en: And when birds of prey came down on the carcasses, Abram drove them away.
zh: 有鷙鳥下來，落在這些屍骸上，亞伯蘭就把牠們嚇走了。

en: As the sun was going down, a deep sleep fell on Abram. And behold, dreadful and great darkness fell upon him.
zh: 日落的時候，亞伯蘭沉沉地睡著了，忽然有可怕的大黑暗落在他身上。

en: Then the LORD said to Abram, "Know for certain that your offspring will be sojourners in a land that is not theirs and will be servants there, and they will be afflicted for four hundred years.
zh: 耶和華對亞伯蘭說：“你要確實地知道，你的後裔必在外地寄居，也必服事那地的人，那地的人苦待他們四百年。

en: But I will bring judgment on the nation that they serve, and afterward they shall come out with great possessions.
zh: 他們所要服事的那國，我要親自懲罰。後來他們必帶著很多財物，從那裡出來。

en: As for yourself, you shall go to your fathers in peace; you shall be buried in a good old age.
zh: 你必得享長壽，被人埋葬，平平安安地回到你列祖那裡。

en: And they shall come back here in the fourth generation, for the iniquity of the Amorites is not yet complete."
zh: 到了第四代，他們必回到這裡，因為亞摩利人的罪孽還沒有滿盈。”

en: When the sun had gone down and it was dark, behold, a smoking fire pot and a flaming torch passed between these pieces.
zh: 日落天黑的時候，忽然有冒煙的爐和燒著的火把，從那些肉塊中經過。

en: On that day the LORD made a covenant with Abram, saying, "To your offspring I give this land, from the river of Egypt to the great river, the river Euphrates,
zh: 就在那時候，耶和華與亞伯蘭立約說： “我已經把這地賜給你的後裔了， 就是從埃及河直到幼發拉底河之地；

en: the land of the Kenites, the Kenizzites, the Kadmonites,
zh: 就是基尼人、基尼洗人、甲摩尼人、

en: the Hittites, the Perizzites, the Rephaim,
zh: 赫人、比利洗人、利乏音人、

en: the Amorites, the Canaanites, the Girgashites and the Jebusites."
zh: 亞摩利人、迦南人、革迦撒人、耶布斯人之地。”
